products.title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
products.description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch.
products.big_description: Comprehensive course covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, databases, and deployment. Includes practical projects, quizzes, and step-by-step guidance to build production-ready web applications.

products.title: Advanced JavaScript Mastery
products.description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript concepts and patterns.
products.big_description: In-depth coverage of modern JavaScript: ES6+, asynchronous patterns, closures, design patterns, performance optimization, and testing. Includes code-alongs, exercises, and real-world examples to sharpen advanced skills.

products.title: React & Next.js Complete Guide
products.description: Build scalable web apps using React and Next.js.
products.big_description: Covers component design, state management, routing, server-side rendering with Next.js, API routes, and performance optimization. Includes real-world projects and deployment walkthroughs to Vercel or similar hosts.

products.title: Node.js & Express API Development
products.description: Create RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.
products.big_description: Step-by-step API development with Express, middleware, authentication, testing, and best practices for building scalable backends. Hands-on projects demonstrate routing, data validation, and deployment.

products.title: Python for Data Science
products.description: Analyze data and build models using Python.
products.big_description: Covers NumPy, pandas, data visualization, statistical analysis, and introductory machine learning with scikit-learn. Projects include data cleaning, exploration, visualization, and model evaluation.

products.title: Machine Learning A-Z
products.description: Master machine learning algorithms and real-world applications.
products.big_description: Comprehensive ML course covering supervised and unsupervised learning, feature engineering, model selection, evaluation, and practical case studies. Includes hands-on projects and best-practice guidance for productionizing models.
